title: RALPH harden agent helper flexible input
description: Run a focused RALPH sweep on bin/agent after adding flexible prompt input modes. Verify easy-missed bugs around stdin/file parsing, curl payload construction, errors, and installed helper sync; patch and document any high-confidence fixes.
close_reason: Completed focused RALPH sweep; patched timeout/input validation/empty-response handling and documented findings.

title: Create RALPH loop skill
description: Package the repeated PinkTank multi-LLM hardening sweep process into an invokable skill that maps unreviewed code surfaces, fans out to diverse LLMs, synthesizes findings, applies high-confidence fixes, documents learnings, and supports repeat passes.
close_reason: RALPH loop skill added, packaging synced, script smoke-tested, and lint passed for new skill.

comments.author: Carl Kibler
comments.text: INVESTIGATION: Packaged the repeated PinkTank multi-LLM sweep as a new ralph-loop skill rather than extending second-opinions. Rationale: second-opinions validates a single decision/diff; RALPH owns the full repeated sweep loop: recon under-reviewed surfaces, assemble bounded packet, launch diverse reviewers, synthesize skeptically, patch high-confidence findings, document learnings, and decide stop/next frontier. Added prompt builder script and Codex/Claude marketplace packaging.

title: Add django-smoke-alarm skill
description: Create an internal Django security smoke-alarm skill from the memedex/pinktank djangoSecurityHunter assessment. Include clean scan discipline, triage workflow, and generated Codex/Claude packaging.
close_reason: Added django-smoke-alarm skill with clean-scan workflow, wrapper script, marketplace registration, and generated Codex packaging. Validated help, py_compile, sync, diff check, and a live memedex smoke scan.

title: Add dry-run tests for agent helper
description: Add a small automated shell test harness for bin/agent --dry-run parsing behavior so future model-map or input handling edits do not break flexible prompt input, stdin, @file, aliases, validation, or failure contracts.
close_reason: Added tests/test_agent.sh dry-run contract harness and README local dev note.

title: Add productivity workflow skills from Toolsmith log forensics
description: Add user-level skills for agent log forensics, remote host verification, release operation, status-copy trust auditing, and visual QA loops.
close_reason: Added five skills, generated Claude/Codex packaging, linted, and smoke-tested helper scripts.

title: handle-pr: fan out one agent per thread
description: Upgrade handle-pr to dispatch parallel subagents — one per comment thread for evaluation, one per file-group for implementation. Expected 60-70% wall-clock reduction. Two phases: (1) parallel evaluation agents classify each thread and produce structured plans; (2) parallel implementation agents each own a file-group, work in isolated worktrees, return diffs; orchestrator applies diffs, runs tests once, commits, replies.

title: changelog-writer skill
description: New skill: given a git range or PR list, produce user-facing changelog in the user's voice, segmented by audience (users, developers, ops). Pairs with handle-pr. Uses git log, PR descriptions, and kindness-check output.

comments.author: Carl Kibler
comments.text: LEARNED: sync_codex_packaging.py also updates README.md — stage it alongside the other generated artifacts or the pre-commit hook will catch drift. Always run git status after sync to see the full file set.

comments.author: Carl Kibler
comments.text: Completed: SKILL.md created with full three-audience classification process, git range detection, Keep a Changelog output format, transformation examples, anti-patterns, and success criteria. marketplace.json updated. All generated Codex artifacts (symlinks, manifests, openai.yaml, icon.svg, README.md) committed and pushed.

title: scope-hammer skill
description: New skill: compression after brainstorming. Hits any spec/ideas from 3 angles: (1) what can be deleted, (2) what can be mocked instead of built, (3) what a dependency already does. Counteracts scope inflation. Suggested_next after wide-open-brainstorm.

title: decision-log skill
description: New skill: captures technical/product decisions in machine-readable format (what was chosen, what was rejected, why). Writes to .agent-context/decisions/. Future agent sessions read this to reconstruct context without re-interrogating the user. Pairs with pre-mortem.

title: post-mortem skill
description: New skill: mirror of pre-mortem for things that already broke. Multi-agent analysis of what happened, why pre-mortem missed it, what assumption failed. Produces lessons-learned doc and feeds back as improvements to existing skill risk registers.

comments.author: Carl Kibler
comments.text: Completed: post-mortem skill created with full 7-phase process (gather facts, timeline, 5-Whys, multi-perspective analysis, learnings-to-skills routing, action items, report). Sync and lint ran clean. Branch pushed: bd-agent-skills-y1s.5

title: launch-sequence skill
description: New orchestrator skill that chains first-contact → support-storm → trust-audit → pre-mortem into a unified pre-launch checklist. Uses suggested_next protocol. Reads .agent-context/ for shared state. Produces ordered to-do list with dependencies and owners.

comments.author: Carl Kibler
comments.text: Completed: launch-sequence skill created and pushed to bd-agent-skills-y1s.3. SKILL.md with full frontmatter, parallel subagent mandates, synthesis logic, and GO/CAUTION/NO-GO verdict format. sync_codex_packaging.py and lint_skills.py both passed clean. PR branch ready for review.

title: SKILL.md as single source of truth
description: Move SKILL_CONFIG dict from sync_codex_packaging.py into SKILL.md frontmatter. New fields: display_name, brand_color, default_prompt, group, summary, suggested_next. Make sync script a pure reader with no hardcoded config. Update lint_skills.py to validate new fields. Update all 12 existing SKILL.md files. This is the root fix for rename pain.

comments.author: Carl Kibler
comments.text: Completed: SKILL_CONFIG dict removed from sync_codex_packaging.py. All 12 skills have new frontmatter fields (display_name, brand_color, local_only, group, usage, summary, default_prompt). lint_skills.py validates new fields. Both scripts run clean. Branch pushed.

title: skill-manager CLI
description: New script scripts/skill_manager.py: 'skill-manager rename old new' does full rename (git mv, SKILL.md frontmatter, sync, lint, patch ~/.claude/settings.json, stage). 'skill-manager new name' scaffolds from template. 'skill-manager delete name' removes all traces. 'skill-manager check' runs health dashboard. PEP 723 standalone script.

title: Skill System Evolution
description: Refactor skill collection into a coherent compounding system. Three pillars: (1) SKILL.md as single source of truth — move SKILL_CONFIG into frontmatter; (2) skill-manager CLI; (3) five new skills. Plus suggested_next handoff hints and existing skill improvements.
